name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Pat the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and the first 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
3. Over hot (not boiling) water, combine chocolate chips and heavy cream until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese and sugar until creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in the chocolate mixture, cherry liqueur, and vanilla until blended. Pour into the prepared crust.
6. Bake at 325°F for 60 minutes.
7. Turn off the oven and let it stand with the door ajar for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely.
9. Chill in the refrigerator for 24 hours.
10. Spread cherry pie filling over the top of the cheesecake, leaving a 1-inch edge uncovered. Decorate the edge with whipped cream if desired.
